name: Dremio
description: Open data lakehouse platform (SQL engine + Apache Iceberg + Project Nessie) for unified analytics and AI directly on object storage.

seo.title: Dremio — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Dremio: Open data lakehouse platform (SQL engine + Apache Iceberg + Project Nessie) for unified analytics and AI directly on object storage.

when_to_use: SQL analytics directly on S3/Parquet data lakes without ETL
Unified lakehouse platform with Apache Iceberg and Nessie catalog
Replacing Redshift with open-format data lake queries via SQL
Branching and versioning Iceberg tables with Nessie for data CI
Federated queries across S3, Snowflake, and Postgres in one UI

pros: Lakehouse SQL engine on object storage
Native Apache Iceberg plus Nessie integration
Query federation across sources in one view
cons: Complex to tune reflections for best performance
Competes with Snowflake on fuzzy value prop
Cloud and self-hosted UX diverge somewhat
review.verdict: Strong open lakehouse play for Iceberg shops, but Snowflake still wins easy-button scenarios.
review.best_for: Teams going all-in on Iceberg and wanting unified BI on S3
review.not_for: Orgs wanting a single warehouse without lakehouse complexity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
